query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, urc.role, urc.cities
FROM users u
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId
WHERE u.name = '小凡' AND urc.role = 'teacher';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, urc.role, urc.cities
FROM users u
JOIN user_role_cities urc ON u.id = urc.userId
WHERE u.name = '小凡' AND urc.role = 'teacher';
